title: Tala Stainless Steel Kitchen Sink Strainer & Plug, 8.1cm Wide, Catches Food Waste & Prevents Blockages, Fits Most Kitchen Sinks, BPA-Free, Durable and Rust-Resistant
features: 2-IN-1 STRAINER AND PLUG: Functions as both a kitchen sink plug and a strainer to catch food debris, vegetable peelings, and waste to help prevent drain blockages
STAINLESS STEEL: Made from durable, rust-resistant stainless steel for long-lasting performance in busy kitchen environments
UNIVERSAL FIT: Designed to fit most standard kitchen sinks with an 8.1cm diameter for a snug and secure fit
EASY TO CLEAN: Made from food-safe, BPA-free materials and can be easily rinsed or wiped clean after use
TALA: Part of the extensive Tala kitchenware range, offering reliable tools and accessories loved by UK households since 1899
description: From the manufacturer About Us Tala is one of Britain's oldest and best-loved kitchenware brands, trusted by cooks all over the world since 1899. We have a rich history of manufacturing kitchen, home and utility wares. Tala has been manufacturing in England since 1899 and today many of our iconic products are still made by hand in England, by small teams of skilled people. We continue to strive to develop invaluable kitchen tools for beauty and efficiency. To buy Tala is to buy something underscored by generations of trust. It is a brand that has developed to meet the needs and wants of all homes to give the best quality in every product.
